SELECT O.id, O.order_date, O.quantity, O.total_amount, P.name, P.category, P.price FROM Orders O JOIN Products P ON O.product_id = P.id WHERE P.category = 'Toys' OR O.quantity >= 3 OR O.status = 'Cancelled' LIMIT 25
SELECT * FROM Orders O JOIN Customers C ON O.customer_id = C.id JOIN Products P ON O.product_id = P.id ORDER BY P.price ASC
SELECT * FROM Orders O JOIN Customers C ON O.customer_id = C.id JOIN Products P ON O.product_id = P.id WHERE C.state = 'Arizona' ORDER BY O.order_date ASC LIMIT 25
SELECT * FROM Orders O JOIN Customers C ON O.customer_id = C.id WHERE O.order_date <= '2024-11-27' OR O.status = 'Refunded' ORDER BY C.city ASC

SELECT O.id, O.order_date, O.total_amount, C.first_name, C.last_name, C.city, P.name, P.category FROM Orders O JOIN Customers C ON O.customer_id = C.id JOIN Products P ON O.product_id = P.id ORDER BY P.price DESC LIMIT 500
SELECT * FROM Orders WHERE quantity > 2 OR status = 'Pending' OR order_date >= '2025-05-20'
SELECT category, COUNT(*), AVG(price), MIN(price), MAX(price), AVG(rating) FROM Products GROUP BY category ORDER BY AVG(price) ASC
SELECT * FROM Products WHERE category = 'Clothing' OR stock_quantity < 215 LIMIT 100
SELECT * FROM Products WHERE category = 'Health' AND rating >= 3.0 AND price <= 842.5
SELECT * FROM Orders O JOIN Customers C ON O.customer_id = C.id JOIN Products P ON O.product_id = P.id WHERE O.status = 'Completed' AND C.state = 'Virginia' AND C.city = 'Alecchester'
SELECT * FROM Orders O JOIN Customers C ON O.customer_id = C.id JOIN Products P ON O.product_id = P.id WHERE O.order_date >= '2026-05-10' ORDER BY P.price DESC
SELECT * FROM Customers ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT * FROM Orders O JOIN Customers C ON O.customer_id = C.id JOIN Products P ON O.product_id = P.id WHERE C.state = 'New York' AND P.price >= 547.86
SELECT O.id, O.order_date, O.total_amount, C.first_name, C.last_name, C.city FROM Orders O JOIN Customers C ON O.customer_id = C.id WHERE C.state = 'Montana' OR O.order_date <= '2025-03-16'
